3. Then leave boiling in the middle fire.

zucchini-stuffed-with-tuna-pequerecetas.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Tuna

ingredients.item: 2 cans of tuna in water, drained

instructions: It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3). Cut the pumpkins in half and remove his pulp carefully and leave an edge of about 1 cm. He pics his pulp and preserves it.
In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add onion, garlic, tomato, pepper and pitted carrot and cook till tender.
Add pumpkin pulp and leaked tuna to frying pan. Cooking for a few more minutes and sauona with salt and pepper to taste.

Fill the pumpkin halves with the tuna and vegetable mixture. Put stuffed pumpkins on an oven plate. Sprinkle grated cheese above. Hornea in the pre-heated oven for about 20-25 minutes, or till the pumpkins are tender and the cheese is golden.
It serves hot and enjoys these delicious cucumbers filled with tuna as a main plate or accompaniment.
